title: model.deprecated data (v2)
$comment: Rule-(c) disappearance carve-out (design.md 1.4c): when source_kind='api-absence' the deprecation/retirement is a negative inference from a model's absence in a /v1/models listing and is entitlement-scoped — the probe account's tier/region may simply lack access (caveat recorded per provider in registry/sources.json). Such events are EXCLUDED from rule-(c) provider-official confirmation and REQUIRE class-(a) corroboration (docs page, provider changelog, or a second account/region probe) before a confirm verdict. Enforced by the verifier and store linter; this schema carries the signal in source_kind.
